'''Orlopp''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jenet/Legends|Jenet]] and [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] of the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] onboard the [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']] during the [[Battle of Hapes (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Hapes]]. He served as [[Darth Caedus]]' administrative aide, and was described as being 'cheeky.'

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]''
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Invincible]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
